  id={undefined}
  label={undefined}
  responses={{"200":{"description":"OK","content":{"*/*":{"schema":{"type":"object","properties":{"detail":{"type":"object","properties":{"annualInterestRate":{"type":"number","description":"Annual interest rate\ne.g. 0.17"},"installmentDay":{"type":"number","description":"Installment date (day in month)\ne.g. 20"},"installmentFirstDate":{"type":"string","format":"date","description":"Date of the first installment\ne.g. 2017-05-20"},"installmentLastDate":{"type":"string","format":"date","description":"Date of the last installment\ne.g. 2018-03-20"},"legalline":{"type":"string","description":"Text interpretation of the offer\ne.g.\n\"Uvedené hodnoty jsou spočítány k datu poskytnutí 18.1.2017, datu 1. splátky 20.1.2017 a se splatností všech dalších splátek k 20. dni v měsíci počítaje 20.1.2017. Nejedná se o nabídku či veřejnou nabídku. Platí při splnění podmínek Home Credit....\""},"paidBack":{"type":"object","required":["currency","value"],"properties":{"currency":{"type":"string"},"value":{"type":"number"}},"title":"Amount"},"predictedProvisionDate":{"type":"string","format":"date","description":"Predicted provision date\ne.g. 2017-05-20"},"rpsn":{"type":"number","description":"RPSN\ne.g. 0.23"}},"title":"Detail"},"flags":{"type":"array","description":"Installment program flags","items":{"type":"object","properties":{"benefit":{"type":"string"},"delayFirstInstallment":{"type":"integer","format":"int32"},"type":{"type":"string","enum":["BENEFIT","CLOSEST","DELAY_FIRST_INSTALLMENT","FAVOURITE","MINIMAL"]}},"title":"InstallmentProgramFlag"}},"installment":{"type":"object","required":["currency","value"],"properties":{"currency":{"type":"string"},"value":{"type":"number"}},"title":"Amount"},"numberOfInstallments":{"type":"number","description":"installment count"},"productCode":{"type":"string","description":"Installment program product code"},"type":{"type":"string","description":"Program type","enum":["MINIMAL","FAVOURITE","OTHER"]}},"title":"InstallmentProgram"}}}},"201":{"description":"Created"},"401":{"description":"Unauthorized"},"403":{"description":"Forbidden"},"404":{"description":"Not Found"}}}
>
  
</StatusCodes>
